package "Commands" {
    class Commands {
        + shape : string
        + Commands(shape:string)
        + Execute() : void
        + Undo() : void
        + Redo() : void
        + PrintSVG() : void
        + CreateSVG() : void
        + «override» ToString() : string
    }
}

interface CommandInt {
    + Execute() : void
}

class AddCMD {
    + shape : string
    + AddCMD(shape:String, history:List<string>)
    + Execute() : void
}

class UndoCMD {
    + UndoCMD(history:List<string>, redoList:List<string>)
    + Execute() : void
}

class RedoCMD {
    + RedoCMD(history:List<string>, redoList:List<string>)
    + Execute() : void
}

class PrintSVGCMD {
    + PrintSVGCMD(history:List<string>)
    + Execute() : void
}

class CreateSVGCMD {
    + CreateSVGCMD(history:List<string>)
    + Execute() : void
}

class "List" as ListClass {
    + history<String>
    + redoList<String>
}

Commands --|> CommandInt
AddCMD --|> CommandInt
UndoCMD --|> CommandInt
RedoCMD --|> CommandInt
PrintSVGCMD --|> CommandInt
CreateSVGCMD --|> CommandInt

AddCMD --> ListClass : history<String>
UndoCMD --> ListClass : history<String>
RedoCMD --> ListClass : history<String>
PrintSVGCMD --> ListClass : history<String>
CreateSVGCMD --> ListClass : history<String>

UndoCMD --> ListClass : redoList<String>
RedoCMD --> ListClass : redoList<String>

@enduml
